client_brief: Acme HVAC Services is a regional HVAC contractor (~30 employees) handling residential and light commercial. Pain: 22% of after-hours calls go to voicemail and 40% of those callers do not call back the next day. They want a voice agent that answers after-hours, gathers caller details, and routes urgency-tagged dispatches to the on-call tech via SMS. Existing stack: HouseCallPro for dispatch, Twilio for inbound SMS, no current AI. Budget signal: comparable peers spending $1.5-2.5k/mo on dispatch tooling.
